codeSystems.name: OrganizationIdType_VS
codeSystems.title: Organization It Type VS
codeSystems.description: Id types for organizations involved in DiagnosticReport/Observation

codeSystems.name: PersonIdType_VS
codeSystems.title: Person Id Type VS
codeSystems.description: Id types used to identify persons involved, other than the patient.

codeSystems.name: PublicIdType_VS
codeSystems.title: PublicIdType_VS
codeSystems.description: Id types used to identify patients

codeSystems.name: SpecimenType_VS
codeSystems.title: Specimen Type VS
codeSystems.description: Type og material in specimen.

codeSystems.name: AllLanguages
codeSystems.title: All Languages
codeSystems.description: This value set includes all possible codes from BCP-47 (see http://tools.ietf.org/html/bcp47)

codeSystems.name: SNOMEDCTBodyStructures
codeSystems.title: SNOMED CT Body Structures
codeSystems.description: This value set includes all codes from [SNOMED CT](http://snomed.info/sct) where concept is-a 442083009 (Anatomical or acquired body site (body structure)).

codeSystems.name: PracticeSettingCodeValueSet
codeSystems.title: Practice Setting Code Value Set
codeSystems.description: This is the code representing the clinical specialty of the clinician or provider who    interacted with, treated, or provided a service to/for the patient. The value set used    for clinical specialty has been limited by HITSP to the value set reproduced from HITSP    C80 Table 2-149 Clinical Specialty Value Set Definition.

codeSystems.name: FHIRDeviceAvailabilityStatus
codeSystems.title: FHIR Device Availability Status
codeSystems.description: The availability status of the device.

codeSystems.name: FHIRDeviceCategory
codeSystems.title: FHIR Device Category
codeSystems.description: The association state of the device.

codeSystems.name: DeviceNameType
codeSystems.title: Device Name Type
codeSystems.description: The type of name the device is referred by.

codeSystems.name: FHIRDeviceOperationMode
codeSystems.title: FHIR Device Operation Mode
codeSystems.description: The operation mode of the device.

codeSystems.name: DeviceType
codeSystems.title: Device Property Type
codeSystems.description: Codes used to identify medical devices. Includes concepts from SNOMED CT (http://www.snomed.org/) where concept is-a 49062001 (Device)  and is provided as a suggestive example.

codeSystems.name: DeviceSafety
codeSystems.title: Device Safety
codeSystems.description: Codes used to identify medical devices safety characteristics. These codes are taken from the [NCI Thesaurus](https://ncit.nci.nih.gov/ncitbrowser/pages/home.jsf) and are provided here as a suggestive example.

codeSystems.name: DeviceSpecificationCategory
codeSystems.title: Device Specification Category
codeSystems.description: The kind of standards used by the device.

codeSystems.name: DeviceSpecificationType
codeSystems.title: Device Specification Type
codeSystems.description: The type or specification of a standard that devices can adhere to

codeSystems.name: FHIRDeviceStatus
codeSystems.title: FHIR Device Status
codeSystems.description: The status of the Device record.

codeSystems.name: DeviceType
codeSystems.title: Device Type
codeSystems.description: Codes used to identify medical devices. Includes concepts from SNOMED CT (http://www.snomed.org/) where concept is-a 49062001 (Device)  and is provided as a suggestive example.

codeSystems.name: DeviceVersionType
codeSystems.title: Device Version Type
codeSystems.description: Describes the type of version

codeSystems.name: IdentifierTypeCodes
codeSystems.title: Identifier Type Codes
codeSystems.description: A coded type for an identifier that can be used to determine which identifier to use for a specific purpose.

codeSystems.name: IdentifierUse
codeSystems.title: IdentifierUse
codeSystems.description: Identifies the purpose for this identifier, if known .

codeSystems.name: CommonLanguages
codeSystems.title: Common Languages
codeSystems.description: This value set includes common codes from BCP-47 (see http://tools.ietf.org/html/bcp47)

codeSystems.name: SNOMEDCTMedicationAsNeededReasonCodes
codeSystems.title: SNOMED CT Medication As Needed Reason Codes
codeSystems.description: This value set includes all clinical findings from SNOMED CT - provided as an exemplar value set.

codeSystems.name: ParticipantRoles
codeSystems.title: Participant Roles
codeSystems.description: Roles of participants that may be included in a care team.  Defined as: Healthcare professional (occupation) or Services (qualifier value).

codeSystems.name: PractitionerRole
codeSystems.title: Practitioner Role
codeSystems.description: This example value set defines a set of codes that can be used to indicate the role of a Practitioner.

codeSystems.name: ProcedureCodesSNOMEDCT
codeSystems.title: Procedure Codes (SNOMED CT)
codeSystems.description: Procedure Code: All SNOMED CT procedure codes.

codeSystems.name: ProcedureReasonCodes
codeSystems.title: Procedure Reason Codes
codeSystems.description: This example value set defines the set of codes that can be used to indicate a reason for a procedure.

codeSystems.name: RequestIntent
codeSystems.title: RequestIntent
codeSystems.description: Codes indicating the degree of authority/intentionality associated with a request.

codeSystems.name: RequestPriority
codeSystems.title: RequestPriority
codeSystems.description: Identifies the level of importance to be assigned to actioning the request.

codeSystems.name: RequestStatus
codeSystems.title: RequestStatus
codeSystems.description: Codes identifying the lifecycle stage of a request.

codeSystems.name: ResourceType
codeSystems.title: Resource Types
codeSystems.description: Concrete FHIR Resource Types

codeSystems.name: ServiceMode
codeSystems.title: Service Mode
codeSystems.description: An example set of Service Modes that could be applicable to use to characterize HealthcareServices or PractitionerRoles while searching

codeSystems.name: ServiceRequestCategoryCodes
codeSystems.title: Service Request Category Codes
codeSystems.description: An example value set of SNOMED CT concepts that can classify a requested service

codeSystems.name: ServiceRequestOrderDetailParameterCode
codeSystems.title: Servicerequest OrderDetail Parameter Code
codeSystems.description: The order detail parameter codes.

codeSystems.name: FHIRSpecimenCollectionMethod
codeSystems.title: FHIR Specimen Collection Method
codeSystems.description: This example value set defines a set of codes that can be used to indicate the method by which a specimen was collected.

codeSystems.name: SpecimenCombined
codeSystems.title: Specimen Combined
codeSystems.description: Codes providing the combined status of a specimen.

codeSystems.name: SpecimenProcessingMethod
codeSystems.title: Specimen Processing Method
codeSystems.description: The technique that is used to perform the process or preserve the specimen. These are codes from SNOMED CT - provided as an exemplar value set.

codeSystems.name: SpecimenRole
codeSystems.title: Specimen Role
codeSystems.description: Codes providing the role of a specimen.

codeSystems.name: SpecimenStatus
codeSystems.title: Specimen Status
codeSystems.description: Codes providing the status/availability of a specimen.

codeSystems.name: UDIEntryType
codeSystems.title: UDI Entry Type
codeSystems.description: Codes to identify how UDI data was entered.

codeSystems.name: Hl7VSSpecimenCondition
codeSystems.title: hl7VS-specimenCondition
codeSystems.description: Concepts of modes or states of being that describe the nature of a specimen.  Used in Version 2 messaging in the SPM segment.

codeSystems.name: Hl7VSRelevantClincialInformation
codeSystems.title: hl7VS-relevantClincialInformation
codeSystems.description: Value Set of codes that specify additional clinical information about the patient or specimen to report the supporting and/or suspected diagnosis and clinical findings on requests for interpreted diagnostic studies.

codeSystems.name: ServiceDeliveryLocationRoleType
codeSystems.title: ServiceDeliveryLocationRoleType
codeSystems.description: A role of a place that further classifies the setting (e.g., accident site, road side, work site, community location) in which services are delivered.
